CurrentIssues.ID: ForbiddenComment:ComposableCache.kt:ComposableCache$// TODO: Replace with AtomicLong when kotlinx-atomicfu is added as a dependency
ForbiddenComment:FakeNavRenderScopeTest.kt:FakeNavRenderScopeTest$// TODO: TestDestination.route requires KSP-generated RouteRegistry registration,

VariableNaming:AnimatedNavContentTest.kt:AnimatedNavContentTest$val ScreenADestination = object : NavDestination { override val data: Any? = "A" override val transition: NavigationTransition? = null }
